title: Trigonometry I: Triangles, Radians and Trig Graphs
description: Solve non-right-angled triangles with the sine and cosine rules and the area formula, work with radian measure, arc length and sector area, and learn the shapes, periods and exact values of the sine, cosine and tangent graphs.
objectives: Apply the sine rule to find missing sides and angles in non-right-angled triangles, including recognising the ambiguous case
Apply the cosine rule to find missing sides and angles in non-right-angled triangles, and find the area using Area = (1/2)ab sin C
Convert between degrees and radians and use radian measure fluently
Calculate arc length and sector area using s = r*theta and Area = (1/2) r^2 theta
Sketch the graphs of sin, cos and tan, stating their period, shape and key features
Recall and use exact trigonometric values for 0, 30, 45, 60 and 90 degrees (and radian equivalents)

lessons.title: The sine rule, cosine rule and area of a triangle
Radians, arc length and sector area
Graphs of sin, cos and tan, and exact values
